name: Additional areas:
description:
Lip Flip
Softly elevates and curls the upper lip for a fuller appearance without filler.

Gummy Smile Correction
Reduces excessive gum show by relaxing the upper lip muscles.

Brow Lift
Lifts and opens the eye area for a more awake, youthful look.

Bunny Lines
Smooths fine lines on the sides of the nose that appear when smiling or scrunching.

Downturned Smile Correction
Softens muscles that pull the mouth corners downward, creating a more relaxed expression.

Nostril Slimming
Refines and narrows the nasal appearance for improved balance and symmetry.

name: Élevé 360 Body Sculpt®
description:
360 contouring for complete silhouette refinement

The Élevé 360 Body Sculpt uses the full system behind The Élevé Method ® & Fat dissolving injections to contour the abdomen, waistline, back and sides simultaneously.
This advanced treatment reduces fat deposits, improves congestion, rejuvenates skin quality and creates a harmonised 360° silhouette with refined definition.

Covers: Abdomen • Waistline • Love Handles • Back

| PLEASE NOTE: Single sessions are reserved for trial/intro assessments only. 
Sculpting results require programmed plans.

name: In-Person Consultation
description:
A comprehensive, face to face assessment where we evaluate your concerns, goals, lifestyle and overall wellness to design your bespoke treatment plan using The Élevé Method®.
This session allows us to take a deeper look at your body profile and outline the most effective treatment pathway.

INCLUDED IN ALL TRIAL / ASSESSMENT ONLY APPOINTMENTS.

(Fee credited towards your treatment when booked within 14 days)
